notes: Initial extraction from TikTok Community Guidelines. Edit this file and push to GitHub to update rules — Streamlit auto-redeploys in ~30 seconds.

real_person.question: Does this video show a **real, identifiable person**?
real_person.help: Deepfakes of real people without consent are banned.

Yes — no consent.detail: Real-person deepfakes without consent are banned. This video will be removed and your account may be permanently suspended.
Yes — no consent.fix: Remove the video. Only use synthetic faces or get written consent from the person depicted.

Yes — but with consent.detail: TikTok may still flag this. Keep evidence of consent ready in case of an appeal.
Yes — but with consent.fix: Have written consent on file. Consider adding a disclaimer in the caption.

No — fully synthetic/animated.message: Fully synthetic content — no real-person deepfake risk

nudity.question: Does this video contain **nudity or explicit sexual content**?

Yes — explicit.detail: Explicit nudity or sexual acts are banned. This will be removed immediately.
Yes — explicit.fix: Remove or heavily edit the video. Suggestive tease aesthetic is OK; explicit is not.

Yes — partial nudity.detail: Partial nudity is restricted and likely to be removed or age-restricted (which kills reach).
Yes — partial nudity.fix: Crop, blur, or reshoot. Keep the tease aesthetic without actual skin exposure.

Suggestive only (tease aesthetic).detail: Suggestive content is allowed but held to a higher standard. Avoid lingering shots of cleavage/bottoms or simulated acts.
Suggestive only (tease aesthetic).fix: Keep transitions fast, focus on outfit/dance/aesthetic rather than body parts.
Suggestive only (tease aesthetic).pass_message: Suggestive (not explicit) — within TikTok's tease line

violence.question: Does this video contain **violence, gore, or weapons**?

Yes.detail: Violent content or weapons are banned or heavily restricted.
Yes.fix: Remove violent elements or reshoot without weapons/injury.

Third-party (not licensed).detail: Using music you don't have rights to = automatic copyright strike. The video will be muted or removed, and repeat strikes can ban your account.
Third-party (not licensed).fix: Use TikTok's in-app music library, or upload your own original audio.

uses_brand.question: Does this video promote a **brand, product, or paid partnership**?
options: Yes — disclosed with Branded Content toggle

Yes — not disclosed.detail: Failing to disclose paid partnerships violates FTC and TikTok rules. Video will be removed and you may lose monetization.
Yes — not disclosed.fix: Turn on TikTok's 'Branded Content' toggle before posting, or add #ad / #sponsored in the caption.

No.message: No commercial content — no disclosure needed

mentions_adult_platform.question: Does the caption mention **OnlyFans, Fansly, or similar**?

Direct link or explicit mention.detail: Directly promoting OnlyFans/Fansly in TikTok posts is against guidelines. The video will likely be removed and reach limited.
Direct link or explicit mention.fix: Use soft teasers like 'exclusive content on my page' without naming the platform or linking directly.

Soft tease only.detail: Soft teasers are tolerated but can limit reach. Don't do this on every post.
Soft tease only.fix: Max 1x/week. Vary the tease language. Never put a direct link in the caption.
